entity.summary: Massa-native automated-market-maker decentralized exchange for token swaps, token creation, liquidity provision, and fee earning, with current on-chain liquidity and historical trading activity.
entity.notes: The original first-party domain currently redirects to a Massa DeWeb-hosted EagleFi DEX application surface. DefiLlama identifies EagleFi as a Massa AMM DEX and reports current TVL together with cumulative fee and DEX-volume history.

evidence.title: EagleFi official DEX application
evidence.notes: Original first-party domain redirects to the current Massa DeWeb-hosted EagleFi DEX application surface, supporting continued product availability.

evidence.title: EagleFi metrics and protocol information
evidence.notes: Registry identifies EagleFi as a Massa AMM DEX and reports current TVL together with cumulative fees and DEX volume.

evidence.title: EagleFi DEX discovery entry
evidence.notes: DEX candidate corpus independently identifies EagleFi as a Massa decentralized exchange.
